series_metadata.series_title: Public Utility Personal Property Tax Annual Reports, Statements, Scheduels & Related Docs
series_metadata.series_description: Annual reports, including but not limited to, U-EL (electric), U-RE (rural electric), U-NG (natural gas), U-PL (pipeline-natural gas), U-OP (oil pipeline), U-WW (water works), U-WT (water transport), U-HE (heating), U-R1 (class 1 railroads) & U-R2 (railroads other than class 1), statements, schedules, taxing district recaps, FERC reports, PUCO reports, appraisals, pictures, maps, assessment certificates, transmittals, related documentation, and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: from date of assessment. ; Electronic: from date of assessment
